cloud_device.title: Cloud Devices
cloud_device.description: Cloud devices are managed VMs that run your AI agents in the cloud. No installation required — just create and start using.
cloud_device.empty: No cloud devices yet. Click the button above to create one.
cloud_device.create_confirm_message: An API Key will be automatically generated for device authentication. The key will be embedded in the cloud device — no manual configuration needed.
cloud_device.create_confirm_note: First-time startup may take 1–3 minutes. Please be patient.
cloud_device.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this cloud device? The VM will be destroyed and all devices on this machine will be removed. This cannot be undone.
cloud_device.creating_notice: Cloud device is being created, will be ready in 1-3 minutes. Please wait...
cloud_device.legacy_upgrade_notice: System image has been upgraded with improved stability and email support. We recommend deleting this cloud device and recreating it.

published_apps.title: Published Apps
published_apps.description: Applications published by the current signed-in user
published_apps.empty_hint: Published apps will appear here with runtime status and access URLs.

errors.timeout: The published apps service timed out

mail_token.title: Company Mail
mail_token.description: Configure a company mail token to enable email-related features
mail_token.input_hint: Contact administrator to get mail token
mail_token.apply_hint: Click the button to automatically apply for a company mail token
mail_token.apply_success: Mail token applied successfully, please save
mail_token.apply_error: Failed to apply for mail token, please try again later
mail_token.apply_failed_contact_admin: You are not in the mail token whitelist. Please contact the administrator to request access.
